001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.view.LayoutInflater;
004import android.view.ViewGroup;
005import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
006import androidx.recyclerview.widget.DiffUtil;
007import androidx.recyclerview.widget.ListAdapter;
008import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.ItemIncubatorBinding;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
011import java.util.Locale;
012
013/**
014 * RecyclerView adapter for displaying incubator items in a list.
015 */
016public class IncubatorAdapter extends ListAdapter<Incubator, IncubatorAdapter.ViewHolder> {
017
018  private final OnIncubatorClickListener listener;
019
020  /**
021   * Constructs an IncubatorAdapter with the specified click listener.
022   *
023   * @param listener the listener to handle incubator item clicks
024   */
025  public IncubatorAdapter(OnIncubatorClickListener listener) {
026    super(DIFF_CALLBACK);
027    this.listener = listener;
028  }
029
030  @NonNull
031  @Override
032  public ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType) {
033    ItemIncubatorBinding binding = ItemIncubatorBinding.inflate(
034        LayoutInflater.from(parent.getContext()), parent, false);
035    return new ViewHolder(binding);
036  }
037
038  @Override
039  public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull ViewHolder holder, int position) {
040    Incubator incubator = getItem(position);
041    holder.bind(incubator);
042    holder.itemView.setOnClickListener((v) -> listener.onIncubatorClick(incubator));
043  }
044
045  /**
046   * Functional interface for handling incubator item click events.
047   */
048  @FunctionalInterface
049  public interface OnIncubatorClickListener {
050
051    /**
052     * Called when an incubator item is clicked.
053     *
054     * @param incubator the incubator that was clicked
055     */
056    void onIncubatorClick(Incubator incubator);
057  }
058
059  /**
060   * ViewHolder for displaying an incubator item.
061   */
062  public static class ViewHolder extends RecyclerView.ViewHolder {
063
064    private final ItemIncubatorBinding binding;
065
066    /**
067     * Constructs a ViewHolder with the specified binding.
068     *
069     * @param binding the view binding for the incubator item
070     */
071    public ViewHolder(@NonNull ItemIncubatorBinding binding) {
072      super(binding.getRoot());
073      this.binding = binding;
074    }
075
076    /**
077     * Binds an incubator to this ViewHolder's views.
078     *
079     * @param incubator the incubator to display
080     */
081    public void bind(@NonNull Incubator incubator) {
082      binding.incubatorName.setText(incubator.getName());
083      binding.incubatorModel.setText(incubator.getModel());
084      binding.incubatorTemp.setText(
085          String.format(Locale.getDefault(), "Temp: %.1f\u00B0F", incubator.getTargetTemperature()));
086      binding.incubatorHumidity.setText(
087          String.format(Locale.getDefault(), "Humidity: %.0f%%", incubator.getTargetHumidity()));
088    }
089  }
090
091  private static final DiffUtil.ItemCallback<Incubator> DIFF_CALLBACK =
092      new DiffUtil.ItemCallback<>() {
093
094        @Override
095        public boolean areItemsTheSame(@NonNull Incubator oldItem, @NonNull Incubator newItem) {
096          return oldItem.getId() == newItem.getId();
097        }
098
099        @Override
100        public boolean areContentsTheSame(@NonNull Incubator oldItem, @NonNull Incubator newItem) {
101          return oldItem.getName().equals(newItem.getName())
102              && oldItem.getModel().equals(newItem.getModel())
103              && oldItem.getTargetTemperature() == newItem.getTargetTemperature()
104              && oldItem.getTargetHumidity() == newItem.getTargetHumidity();
105        }
106      };
107
108}
